"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "### Impact

An attacker is able to craft and send a user a URL that will redirect the user from the Concourse web server to any other site. This could be used in a phishing attack to steal user's credentials.

### Patches

This has been fixed in 8.2.3

### Workarounds

None.

### Exploit

Vulnerable code was in: https://github.com/concourse/concourse/blob/ea7b812e3a88fdd070f0faece874e8a2d4fbb31c/skymarshal/skyserver/skyserver.go#L162-L170

The issue stems from the underlying processing logic of Go's `url` package. Normally, `ParseRequestURI()` will eventually reach an internal `url.setPath()` function, where the URL will be decoded. However, if `RawPath` is not empty and `validEncoded(RawPath)` is true, and the decoded result equals `Path`, then return `RawPath` as is; otherwise, escape `Path` again, i.e., decode it again.

In other words, if the URL contains dangerous characters that should be escaped, such as backslashes (`\`), then an extra decoding step will be performed. Therefore, `/%2Fexample.com` will be parsed as `//example.com`.

On vulnerable versions of Concourse, add `/sky/login?redirect_uri=/%252Fexample.com/\` to your Concourse external URL, login as usual, and you should be redirected to `example.com` instead of your Concourse web server. The redirect happens after the login flow completes. No credentials are leaked.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8w27-c4vc-88q9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T19:01:16Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8w27-c4vc-88q9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8w27-c4vc-88q9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49826"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-01T19:01:16Z", "references": ["https://github.com/concourse/concourse/security/advisories/GHSA-8w27-c4vc-88q9", "https://github.com/concourse/concourse/commit/ac60be5f0435b6592f5a4fcc089050d72ad2452c", "https://github.com/concourse/concourse/releases/tag/v8.2.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8w27-c4vc-88q9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/concourse/concourse/security-advisories/GHSA-8w27-c4vc-88q9", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/concourse/concourse", "summary": "Concourse login flow has an open redirect issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T19:01:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8w27-c4vc-88q9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.6.1-0.20260526150512-ac60be5f0435", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/concourse/concourse"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.6.1-0.20260526150512-ac60be5f0435"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Concourse login flow has an open redirect issue
